title: Bridge Snap
subject: Engineering
description: Design and Test bridges through physics — learn about trusses, tension, compression, and material science.
longDescription: Bridge Snap is an educational bridge construction game. Players place road segments,support beams, cables, and rope to build structures that must support vehicles crossing a gap.

The game teaches core structural engineering concepts: triangulation, load distribution, material properties, tension vs compression, and efficient design. Each level introduces new materials and heavier vehicles, progressively building the player's understanding.
Bridges that simulate and behave realistically — they hold rigid when properly supported, show stress colors under load, and break at the weakest point when overloaded.
